style_authority.note: Uses the calm high-frequency operations context to preserve causal motion while rejecting delay, spectacle, and input lockout.

reference_selection.note: Correctly applies motion quality, interaction physics, design-system ownership, accessibility, performance, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Questions which motion should exist and avoids adding decorative animation or generic smoothing.

evidence_level.note: Labels static source evidence and treats lag, frame rate, compositing, touch feel, and browser behavior as unverified risks.

verified_boundary.note: Separates directly visible code defects from runtime-only coordinate, transition, scrolling, refresh-rate, and device behavior.

design_moves.note: Covers pointer ownership, grab offset, 1:1 transforms, presentation-value interruption, px/s velocity, projection, soft bounds, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Remains motion-specific and decisive, but 182 lines exceed the requested 150-line budget.
